$comment: Archetype proportion anchors for the geometry-sanity validator. Ratios are soft bounds; violations produce warnings, hard violations produce errors. Keys reference part ids (or role aliases the spec author maps via _roles). All ratios are relative unless noted.

quadruped._doc: Generic 4-legged creature (rabbit, fox, dog). Roles: head, body, leg_*, ear_* optional.

rules.msg: Ear height should not exceed ~1.4x head height; tall thin ears read as antennae.
Ears shorter than 0.4x head height may be hard to read.
Body width should be >=0.55x its height, else it looks like a column/pillar.
Quadruped bodies are usually deeper than wide (front-to-back).
Head wider than ~1.2x body looks bobble-headed (unless intended cartoon).
Legs taller than 1.5x body height look stilted.
Legs thinner than 1px read as sticks.

humanoid._doc: Bipedal humanoid (player-like). Roles: head, body, arm_*, leg_*.

rules.msg: Humanoid heads are roughly cube-ish; very elongated heads look odd.
Humanoid torso is usually at least as tall as wide.
Arms much shorter than 0.7x torso look stubby.
Legs much shorter than 0.8x torso look squat.

furniture_block._doc: Static furniture/prop that fits in/around a block. Roles flexible.

rules.msg: Block-target furniture wider than 16px leaves the block footprint.
Block-target furniture deeper than 16px leaves the block footprint.
Taller than one block; ok if intended multi-block but flag it.

item_simple._doc: Flat-ish item, usually 16x16 in one plane.
